col_2: Vitz SCP90 EPS column complete set (motor+torque sensor+reduction housing)
col_3: Use Vitz EPS column conversion path (confirmed project direction).
col_11: Bench test under load; no play/noise; matching splines for shaft plan.

col_3: Must match column generation; avoid mixed ECU/column pairings.
col_11: Same donor family as EPS column; test assist behavior before install.

col_3: Use new U-joints/couplers where possible, custom length after mock-up.
col_11: No binding through full steering sweep; proper phasing and lock-to-lock clearance.

col_3: Fabricate locally using jig alignment; do not compromise column angle.
col_11: Column axis alignment and weld quality inspection before final paint.

col_2: Ironman Foamcell suspension kit - ordered path
col_3: Use attached ordered kit; track main shipment plus separate front damper pair.
col_11: Verify delivered kit contents against supplier part list before install; no local/OME/Bilstein alternatives remain active.

col_3: Inspect in place first; do not buy unless sag/crack/separation/oil-soak failure is confirmed or engine is already being safely supported/lifted for another approved job.
col_11: Match 2H mount geometry; no engine lift purchase solely for mounts.

col_2: Gearbox/transfer mounts + shifter top service items
col_3: Directly relevant to clunky shift/disengage symptoms.
col_11: Mounts + shifter bushes/detents condition check during tub-off access.
No used/refurb glow plugs. Brand and part-number verification required.

col_2: Fuel filter + oil filter + service fluids bundle
col_3: Buy as one service bundle from Toyota/common parts market.

col_11: Use fuel-rated hose only, no coolant-hose substitutes.

col_3: Replace brittle/aged hoses while access is open.
col_11: Diameter and bend radius match; no kinks at full engine movement.

col_2: Body-to-chassis mount rubber kit + shim pack
col_3: Replace all main mount rubbers and shim stack to OEM mount points.
col_11: Do not final torque until tub is aligned on all points.

col_3: Replace all penetration grommets during final loom sealing.
col_11: Match each hole OD/ID; add slit grommets only where service needed.

col_3: Full rubber refresh for weatherproofing after body finish.
col_11: Cross-section/profile check against existing channels before purchase.

col_2: Exhaust hangers + pedal rubbers + seal O-rings
col_11: Buy by dimension and material, not only by model keyword.
